headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Camden Prop Trust, Raises Price Target to $125
summary: Mizuho  analyst Vikram Malhorta   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $120 to $125.
